inputs.text: Main thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can be seen in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although typhoid is a possibility, the symptoms are not specific enough to rank it higher

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi hai, aur kabz ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although viral fever is still a possibility, the abdominal symptoms suggest another diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The step-wise increase in fever and abdominal symptoms could suggest typhoid, but more specific symptoms are needed

inputs.text: Ab mere bukhar bahut tez hai, kabz ke baad dast ho rahi hai, aur main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are classic signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause abdominal symptoms, the severity of the symptoms and the presence of fever suggest typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the absence of specific symptoms such as chills and rigors

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai, aur pet mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, abdominal pain, and severe weakness confirm the diagnosis of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out given the duration and severity of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out given the absence of specific symptoms and the confirmation of typhoid
